source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for tiflash_test.go
source_pr.body:

symptoms: c.Skip("skip race test because of long running")
failure_signature: c.Skip("skip race test because of long running")
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor/tiflash_test` (and related executor tests) from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues and is often used to improve stability of previously skipped/slow race tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based executor tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: c.Skip("skip race test because of long running")
